title: Better Vanilla
description: A group of mods that makes minecraft look better and give player more information about some things without changing any gameplay.
body:
<details>
<summary>Purpose of the Modpack</summary>
Make minecraft look better,
   
Give player more information (For example: list of every item in minecraft and how to obtain it, what block are you looking at and what tool you need to break it, how much hunger certain food gives, saturation)
</details>


<details>
<summary>List of Mods</summary>

[Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin),

[Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei),

[WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit),

[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks),

[Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium),

[Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shaders</summary>

[Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

</details>


<details>
<summary>How to turn on the Shader</summary>

Go to Options -> then click Video Settings -> then on the left, click Shader Packs -> then click on superDuperVanilla.zip -> then click Apply -> click done. Now shader pack is turned on!

</details>
